# Auto-generated by Supabase CLI (or manually created)
# This file should contain your PRODUCTION database credentials
# DO NOT commit this file to version control!

# Database URLs
# Connection pooler (Supavisor) - for serverless/edge functions
DATABASE_URL="postgresql://postgres.[PROJECT]:[PASSWORD]@aws-0-us-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:6543/postgres?pgbouncer=true&connection_limit=1"

# Direct connection - for migrations and long-running operations
DIRECT_URL="postgresql://postgres:[PASSWORD]@db.[PROJECT].supabase.co:5432/postgres"

# Supabase Configuration
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL="https://[PROJECT].supabase.co"
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY="[YOUR_ANON_KEY]"
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY="[YOUR_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY]"

# Application base URL - used for generating links in emails and redirects
# Must match your production domain
NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL="https://your-domain.com"

# Email Rate Limiting - delay between bulk email sends
# Loops API has a baseline rate limit of 10 requests/second
# Default: 200ms (5 emails/second - conservative with buffer)
# Adjust based on your Loops plan rate limits
LOOPS_EMAIL_SEND_DELAY_MS="200"

# Usage:
# env $(grep -v '^#' .env.production | grep -v '^$' | xargs) npm run export-production-data
